exec: var d = pm.response.json(); if (d.data && d.data.access_token) { pm.collectionVariables.set("access_token", d.data.access_token); }

}

exec: pm.test("Has name and price", function () { var d = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property("name"); pm.expect(d).to.have.property("price"); });
